mapper.select: SELECT m.memberId, m.memberName AS orderReceiver, m.memberPhone1 AS orderReceiverPhone1, m.memberPhone2 AS orderReceiverPhone2, m.memberPhone3 AS orderReceiverPhone3, m.memberEmail1 AS orderReceiverEmail1, m.memberEmail2 AS orderReceiverEmail2, m.memberZip1 AS orderZip1, m.memberZip2 AS orderZip2, m.memberZip3 AS orderZip3, p.pointRemain FROM member m LEFT JOIN point p ON m.memberId = p.memberId WHERE m.memberId = #{memberId}

SELECT productNo, productName, productOptions AS orderProductOptions, productQty, productPrice, image.imageFilename AS imageFileName FROM product JOIN image ON product.productNo = image.articleNo WHERE productNo = #{productNo} LIMIT 1

SELECT b.productNo, p.productPrice, p.productName, b.basketProductOptions AS orderProductOptions, b.basketProductQty AS orderQty, i.imageFilename AS imageFileName FROM product p JOIN basket b ON b.productNo = p.productNo JOIN ( SELECT imageFilename, articleNo FROM ( SELECT imageNo, articleNo, imageFilename, imageType, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY articleNo ORDER BY imageNo ASC) AS rn FROM image ) AS img WHERE rn = 1 ) i ON i.articleNo = p.productNo WHERE b.memberId = #{memberId} AND b.productNo = #{productNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('orders_seq')
INSERT INTO orders ( orderNo, memberId, orderReceiver, orderReceiverPhone1, orderReceiverPhone2, orderReceiverPhone3, orderReceiverEmail1, orderReceiverEmail2, orderZip1, orderZip2, orderZip3, orderMessage, orderDate, orderPaytype, productPoint, joinNo ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{memberId}, #{orderReceiver}, #{orderReceiverPhone1}, #{orderReceiverPhone2}, #{orderReceiverPhone3}, #{orderReceiverEmail1}, #{orderReceiverEmail2}, #{orderZip1}, #{orderZip2}, #{orderZip3}, #{orderMessage}, NOW(), #{orderPaytype}, #{productPoint}, #{orderNo} )

INSERT INTO ordersJoin ( joinNo, productNo, orderProductOptions, orderQty, orderPoints, orderAmount, orderStatement ) VALUES ( #{joinNo}, #{productNo}, #{orderProductOptions}, #{orderQty}, #{orderPoints}, #{orderAmount}, #{orderStatement} )
